# ferriskey_organization_member (Resource)

Adds a user as a member of an organization. A pure link: any change recreates it.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ferriskey_organization_member" "example" {
  realm           = "acme"
  organization_id = ferriskey_organization.tenant.organization_uuid
  user_id         = ferriskey_user.alice.user_uuid
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) UUID of the organization. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `realm` (String) Realm the organization belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `user_id` (String) UUID of the user to add. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier `{realm}/{organization_id}/{user_id}`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import ferriskey_organization_member.example acme/ORG_UUID/USER_UUID
```
